skills.description: Compliance & Consent — Consent Mode v2, CMP integration, pre-consent firing, PII exposure, GDPR/CCPA/LGPD, cross-border data transfer
Tracking Coverage — event parity matrix, missing conversions, remarketing gaps, enhanced conversions, industry-specific gaps
Container Architecture — naming conventions, folder structure, orphaned items, duplicate tags, trigger/variable organization
Data Quality — GA4 ecommerce schema, parameter completeness, variable types, hardcoded values, type mismatches, missing mappings
Performance & Security — Custom HTML risks, third-party domains, firing frequency, tag sequencing, container weight, race conditions
